status: CONVERGED — all 4 roles approve the system; $80M target unanimously rejected as infeasible

iteration2_validations.confidence_index: VALIDATED — High bucket +3.16%/trade vs Med +1.10% (monotonic). BEAR_BOUNCE over-rated.
iteration2_validations.signal_exit: ESSENTIAL — removing it drops Sharpe 1.30->0.76; keep it.
iteration2_validations.dd_killswitch: ON (25%) — cuts maxDD ~5pts at small return cost
iteration2_validations.sizing_margin: VALIDATED via frontier — 0-liq to ~5x, ruin beyond ~8x

feasibility.note: 231% CAGR/yr sustained; even 100%/yr only reaches $512k in 10y

verdict_80M: INFEASIBLE under no-liquidation. Max 0-liq edge ~116% CAGR -> ~$1M in 10y, 73x short of $80M, at brutal -73% DD. >=8x brings liquidation -> ruin.
next_iteration_agenda: Validate confidence index as its own loop (step 5): does higher conf -> higher realized edge?
Validate sizing (step 6) and margin (step 7) as separate loops with re-do on rejection
Cut turnover/funding drag (340 signal-exits, $8.6k fees, $4k funding)
Pick role-agreed operating point given 80M is infeasible; revise target
Build dashboard for the new system; reach 4-role convergence
